raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a police report because someone stole my identity and used information to obtain a credit card from Citi Diamond ( my account ) sent their address. They proceeded to make fraudulent charges. I called Citi Diamond about these fraudulent charges. The thief changed all my information to match theirs as in the home address, security word. The thief address also shows up on my credit reports. So, when I called Citi Diamond, they are stating my information doesn't match the suspect 's changed information which is on the account, therefore they can't verify me or give me any details pertaining to my account. They also prematurely closed out my account, which I did not authorize. 
The crook got a new credit sent to them under my name, so I do not have that account number
